headlines.title: Trump attends dignified transfer of 4 service members killed in Iran attacks since the ceasefire ended
headlines.description: The president has attended two previous dignified transfers since the war began; this is the first since he declared the ceasefire over.

headlines.title: Trump hypes Mike Collins’ Senate campaign at Georgia rally
headlines.description: GOP Rep. Mike Collins is taking on Sen. Jon Ossoff, a well-funded Democrat, in a key battleground race.

headlines.title: Trump-backed Steve Hilton on his bid to sway anti-Trump voters in California gubernatorial race
headlines.description: California gubernatorial candidate Steve Hilton (R) joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss his new push to sway voters who might dislike President Trump and lays out the policy areas where he disagrees with the president despite touting Trump’s endorsement.

headlines.title: Trump escalates threats on Iran as he attends dignified transfer of fallen soldiers
headlines.description: NBC News correspondents Monica Alba, Courtney Kube and Julie Tsirkin report on recent developments regarding the war with Iran as President Trump attends the dignified transfer of four soldiers killed in the Middle East. NBC News Intelligence Reporter Dan De Luce reports on President Trump’s approval of a deal with Saudi Arabia to develop a civilian nuclear program which is raising concerns over nuclear proliferation.

headlines.title: White House to announce nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia
headlines.description: The White House plans to announce a nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia, according to a senior administration official. The agreement will see the U.S. support the creation of a nuclear power program and see American companies build the program in the kingdom, the official told NBC News.

headlines.title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada
headlines.description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

headlines.title: U.S. signs landmark nuclear agreement with Saudi Arabia
headlines.description: The U.S. signed a landmark nuclear agreement with Saudi Arabia on Wednesday, the U.S.

headlines.title: Departures of Senate-confirmed Trump officials are surpassing his first term, new report finds
headlines.description: The Trump administration is facing a spike in departures of powerful Cabinet department officials compared to his first term, according to the nonprofit Partnership for Public Service.

headlines.title: Democratic leaders’ pick trails in Arizona primary for a key battleground district
headlines.description: Democrat Amish Shah, a physician and former state lawmaker, has opened a lead in the primary for a key Arizona battleground district despite party leaders backing another candidate.

headlines.title: Alexander Kolodin, who tried to overturn Arizona election results, wins GOP nod for secretary of state
headlines.description: Kolodin will face Democratic incumbent Adrian Fontes after defeating former state Republican Party chair Gina Swoboda, NBC News projects.

headlines.title: Trump-backed Rep. Andy Biggs wins GOP primary for Arizona governor
headlines.description: NBC News projects that Biggs defeated fellow Rep. David Schweikert to move on to the general election against Democratic Gov. Katie Hobbs.

headlines.title: 6,600 noncitizens were registered to vote in N.J. because of a ‘software error,’ governor says
headlines.description: Democratic Gov. Mikie Sherrill said a review found that around 400 noncitizens cast ballots in elections from 2023 to 2024. The DOJ said it’s investigating the matter.
